arts.ttl: PSG Standout Had No Interest in Real Madrid Reunion With Mbappé
arts.sum: On Thursday, RMC Sport reported that Achraf Hakimi has extended his contract with Paris Saint-Germain until 2029. Despite the rumors linking him to Real Madrid, the 26-year-old will stay in the French capital for a long time. The Morocco international’s current deal was set to expire in 2026, but two more years have been added. arts.ttl: Liverpool Set to Have £17M Offer for PSG Transfer Target Rejected
arts.sum: Last week, Olympique Lyonnais received a significant sanction from the DNCG (Direction Nationale du Contrôle de Gestion), placing the club under substantial financial pressure. While the Ligue 1 side have to sell players, they are holding out for prices they believe are suitable. arts.sum: FC Barcelona could soon act on a long-held admiration for a player as the Spanish side attempt to make a big-money signing in 2025. Paris Saint-Germain showed serious interest in Khvicha Kvaratskhelia during the summer, but a move didn’t come together. arts.ttl: Man Utd’s €60M-Rated Star Faces Ultimatum Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s future at Manchester United could be decided during the 2024-25 season, with Ruben Amorim now in charge. One pundit gave a dim outlook on the 27-year-old’s future at Old Trafford under the new manager. Last month, TEAMtalk reported that Paris Saint-Germain have renewed its interest in Rashford. arts.ttl: Juventus eye Skriniar as Luis Enrique states: “When you don’t play, you’re unhappy”
arts.sum: Milan Skriniar remains Juve’s prime target as they look to reinforce a beleaguered back-line. The former Inter Milan centre-back, now at Paris Saint-Germain, has found himself on the fringes of the team, making only four appearances this season, with just three as a starter. Calciomercato report how Skriniar’s situation at PSG has become increasingly frustrating for the player. He has been consistently left on the bench during Champions League matches, where the Parisian club has struggled, securing only one win in four games. The Slovak international has expressed his dissatisfaction with his current role while on national team duty, where The post Juventus eye Skriniar as Luis Enrique states: “When you don’t play, you’re unhappy” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Nuno Mendes and Senny Mayulu absent for PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will be without Nuno Mendes (22) and Senny Mayulu (18) for Friday night’s encounter against Toulouse FC. Mayulu’s period of absence is estimated at two weeks, meaning that…

arts.ttl: Man Utd IN TALKS to sign PSG star on loan
arts.sum: Manchester United are in talks with Paris Saint-Germain over a possible loan deal for Randal Kolo-Muani, according to reports. French outlet Le10sport have reported that the Premier League giants are looking to bring the out-of-favour Frenchman on loan.

arts.ttl: Torino gem Ciammaglichella being tracked by PSG
arts.sum: Aaron Ciammaglichella’s journey with Torino began at the tender age of four and a half, marking the start of a remarkable ascent through the club’s youth ranks. Now 19, the talented midfielder has already achieved milestones that many players can only dream of: playing for the Primavera team at 16, earning his first senior squad call-up at 18, and making his Serie A debut at 19 in a 2-1 victory against Atalanta last August. arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani’s role at Paris Saint-Germain appears limited, as manager Luis Enrique has shown little interest in making him the team’s starting No. 9. Amid the uncertainty, a new report suggests a Premier League club has already made contact regarding the French forward.
